The '''''Tal'cara''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] owned and operated by the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]].

Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], ''Tal'cara'' was used as a transport for a team of Bothan delegates during a meeting between the Spynet and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], escorted by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] of the [[Calico]] squadron. The meeting took place in deep space, presumably for both security and to have a sense of neutral ground; its purpose was to discuss the terms of the Spynet's infiltration of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].

The Alliance cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was to represent the Rebellion in the negotiations, she arrived in the area first, escorted by a pair of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] flown by reputed pilots [[Olin Garn]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. Within minutes, ''Tal'cara'' arrived and took up position some distance from ''Liberty''. The [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] [[Jade (Lambda-class)|''Jade'']] then launched from ''Tal'cara'', carrying the delegates and their leader, [[Borsk Fey'lya]] to the ''Liberty''.

However, before the shuttle could arrive at ''Liberty''{{'s}} hangar bay, the meeting came under attack from a mercenary group. [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]] attacked Tal'cara and her escorting [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], while [[IRD starfighter|Authority IRDs]] went after ''Jade''. Quick action from the Alliance A-Wing pilots, however, prevented the IRDs from destroying the shuttle. Meanwhile, ''Tal'cara'' and its attendant Y-wings fended off the Skiprays and a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]], [[Intruder (Marauder-class)|''Intruder'']].

The mercenaries were eventually defeated, with Alliance shuttle ''[[Compassion]]'' picking up a survivor from [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] [[EE-763]] launched by the Corvette, who claimed he was hired by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]]. ''Tal'cara'' then retrieved her delegates after the meeting's conclusion, and entered hyperspace.
